title: Meta confirms 1000s of Instagram accounts were hacked by abusing its AI chatbot
summary: Meta fixed the bug that let anyone trick its Meta AI chatbot into resetting the password on Instagram accounts that didn't have two-factor authentication.

title: Pentagon raised threat of Israeli spying on U.S. to highest level, sources say
summary: WASHINGTON — The Pentagon is increasingly concerned about Israel ramping up its spying on the U.S., recently raising the counterintelligence threat level from America’s top ally in the Middle East to the highest level, according to two U.S. officials and one former U.S. official

title: Ntsc-rs – open-source video emulation of analog TV and VHS artifacts
summary: ntsc-rs is a free, open-source VHS and analog TV video effect. Use it online in your browser, as a standalone application, or as a plugin for DaVinci Resolve, After Effects, and more.

title: New U.S. college grads now have higher unemployment than the average worker
summary: A recent U.S. college degree long meant lower unemployment than the average worker. That edge flipped in 2019, and the gap is now the widest on record.
